code_dossier.name: UpdateUserInfoRequest.java
code_dossier.description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) used to encapsulate user information update requests in the account management system. It uses a flexible Map-based structure to allow dynamic field updates.

data.detailed_description:
This component is a simple Data Transfer Object (DTO) class designed to carry user information update requests within the account management API module. The class leverages Lombok's @Data annotation to automatically generate boilerplate code including getters, setters, toString, equals, and hashCode methods.

The design uses a Map<String, Objects> structure to hold update data, which provides flexibility in allowing arbitrary fields to be updated without requiring a rigid schema. This is a partial update pattern commonly used in REST APIs where clients can specify only the fields they want to modify.

However, there is a notable issue in the code: the Map value type is declared as `java.util.Objects` (a utility class) instead of `Object` (the base class), which is likely a programming error that would prevent the code from working as intended at runtime.

The component sits in the DTO layer of a typical layered architecture, serving as a contract between API consumers and the account service for user update operations.
responsibilities: Encapsulate user information update request data for API communication
Provide a flexible data structure for partial user profile updates
Serve as a data contract between API clients and the account service
Enable dynamic field updates without rigid schema constraints

interfaces.name: UpdateUserInfoRequest
interfaces.description: DTO class for carrying user update request data with Lombok-generated accessors
